title: Reid Hoffman Thinks Doctors Should Ask AI for a Second Opinion
description: The LinkedIn cofounder now has an AI drug discovery startup—and thinks not asking chatbots for medical advice is “bordering on committing malpractice.”

title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
description: You need infrastructure to build AI a and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.

title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
description: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
description: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
description: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
description: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

title: How Elon Musk Squeezed OpenAI: They 'Are Gonna Want to Kill Me’
description: Tensions flared on the third day of trial in Musk v. Altman as OpenAI’s lawyers cross-examined Musk.

title: Emergency First Responders Say Waymos Are Getting Worse
description: “I believe the technology was deployed too quickly in too vast amounts, with hundreds of vehicles, when it wasn’t really ready,” one police official told federal regulators last month.

title: Taylor Swift Wants to Trademark Her Likeness. These TikTok Deepfake Ads Show Why
description: Researchers show scammers are using AI-manipulated footage of celebrity interviews to trick users into sharing their personal data.

title: ABC can beat Trump FCC's license threat if owner Disney is willing to fight
description: Broadcast license renewals are "all but automatic" due to 1996 change in US law.

title: OpenAI Codex system prompt includes explicit directive to "never talk about goblins"
description: Directions also include system instructions to act like "you have a vivid inner life."

title: Howdy's dated $3/month ad-free streaming service said to have 1M subscribers
description: Most are keeping their subscriptions after signing up, too, research firm says.

title: New Sam Bankman-Fried trial would be huge waste of court’s time, judge says
description: FTX fraudster came out as Republican, then tried to claim Biden's DOJ targeted him.

title: Drone strikes on data centers spook Big Tech, halting Middle East projects
description: Uninsurable war damage is forcing tech companies to rethink Middle East plans.

title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed
description: With US restrictions limiting its access to advanced tech, SenseTime is doubling down on open source with a new model optimized to run on Chinese-made chips.

title: The Download: storing nuclear waste and orchestrating agents
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. description: Today, nuclear energy enjoys a rare moment of support across the political spectrum in the US. title: The Download: Musk and Altman’s legal showdown, and AI’s profit problem
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
description: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. title: The missing step between hype and profit
description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
